home.title: Plan the day without losing the flow.
home.subtitle: A compact task dashboard for the PWA shell: fast to open, useful offline, and ready for mobile install.

benefits.title: Offline app shell
benefits.description: Navigation falls back to a cached page when the network is gone.

benefits.title: Install prompt ready
benefits.description: Manifest and icons make the browser treat it like an app.

benefits.title: Static cache
benefits.description: CSS, JS, and shell routes are prepared by the service worker.

task_tools.title: Local task editor
task_tools.description: Create, edit, and delete tasks after Premium is activated. Everything stays on this device.
task_tools.locked_hint: Activate Premium to unlock local task editing.
task_tools.subscription_hint: Tasks remain after cancellation until you clear the PWA cache.

onboarding.title: Three screens before value is clear.
onboarding.subtitle: A neutral prototype of the mobile onboarding path shown in the reference flow.

steps.title: Welcome to Tasks
steps.description: Collect tasks, goals, and reminders in one installable workspace.

steps.title: Plan your time
steps.description: Create a clear day plan and keep priorities visible.

steps.title: Never miss it
steps.description: Reminder surfaces and cached shell make the app useful even on weak links.

paywall.title: Unlock the full task system.
paywall.subtitle: Premium adds reminders, calendar sync, analytics, and offline-first confidence.

benefits.title: Unlimited monthly tasks
benefits.description: Create as many plans and recurring items as you need.

benefits.title: Reminder notifications
benefits.description: Keep the next action visible at the right moment.

benefits.title: Calendar and planning
benefits.description: Prototype the screens that a real app would connect to native calendars.

benefits.title: Priority support
benefits.description: Show the subscription value without wiring real billing.

pricing.title: Choose a tariff.
pricing.subtitle: Mock plans copied from a typical subscription flow. The selected card moves to payment.

plans.name: Premium
plans.description: Monthly access to core premium tools.

payment.title: Choose a payment method.
payment.subtitle: This is a UI prototype only. No payment data is stored or sent.
payment.secure_hint: Secure connection mock. Your data is protected in the prototype.

processing.title: Processing payment.
processing.subtitle: Please wait. This may take a few seconds in a real integration.

success.title: Subscription activated.
success.subtitle: Thank you for trusting Tasks. Premium tools are now available in the prototype.

subscription.title: Manage subscription.
subscription.subtitle: A realistic management screen for plan, payment method, history, restore, and cancellation.

actions.label: Change tariff
actions.description: Switch between Premium, Pro, and Business.

local_data.title: Local task database
local_data.description: Export tasks with statuses, import another JSON database, or clear offline cache and local PWA data.
local_data.hint: Export before clearing if you want to restore this local task database later.

cancel.title: Are you sure you want to cancel?
cancel.subtitle: The screen mirrors a typical retention flow without touching any real subscription.

reasons.title: Your data stays safe
reasons.description: Tasks are not deleted in this prototype.

reasons.title: You can return later
reasons.description: Subscription state can be restored in a real app.

reasons.title: We will miss you
reasons.description: The UI keeps the tone clear without dark patterns.

offline.title: You are offline.
offline.subtitle: The PWA shell is still available. Return to the dashboard or reconnect to refresh live content.
offline.cached_hint: This page is served from the service worker navigation fallback.

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro for deep work.
pomodoro.subtitle: A quiet desktop and tablet timer for Edge sessions. It runs while this tab stays open and stores settings only for the current session.
pomodoro.session_hint: Settings use session storage and disappear after the tab is closed.
pomodoro.mobile_title: Pomodoro lab is for larger screens.
pomodoro.mobile_subtitle: Open this secret URL on a desktop or tablet. Mobile keeps the TASKS shell light and shows this placeholder instead.
